creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=2346592c66e8c93e85a61ea35eb3ec136661d2bf

commit 2346592c66e8c93e85a61ea35eb3ec136661d2bf
Author:     Jonathan Schleifer <js@nil.im>
AuthorDate: 2023-10-08 17:54:16 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-10-09 07:40:31 +0000

    devel/objfw: update to 1.0.4

    ObjFW 1.0.3 -> ObjFW 1.0.4, 2023-10-08
     * Fixes OFFile closing fd 0 when initialization fails
     * Fixes -[stringByAppendingPathComponent:] on empty strings
     * Fixes +[OFSystemInfo operatingSystemName] and
       +[OFSystemInfo operatingSystemVersion] returning nil on some systems
     * Adds a license for localizations

    PR:             274353
    MFH:            2023Q4

 devel/objfw/Makefile  | 2 +-
 devel/objfw/distinfo  | 6 +++---
 devel/objfw/pkg-plist | 2 +-
 3 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
